entries.title: Ephraim the Syrian on Genesis 19
entries.excerpt: Two angels come to Sodom, draw near the gates at which Lot sat to receive strangers entering the city. “When Lot saw, he rose up to meet them,” as he usually met strangers. But when he drew near them, in one of the two who had come he saw the same as Abraham had seen in one of the three, “and bowed himself with his face toward the ground” (Gen 19:1). It is likely that the angels who came to the Sodomites had a beautiful appearance, for the words “I will go down now, and see” (Gen 18:21) mean the same as “going down, I will test them.…
